dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The initial rules-context-loader failed with a JSON Parse Failure, meaning specific governance rules may not have been correctly injected into the reasoning context. However, the 3 subsequent logic steps (mapping, alignment, and intent) all succeeded with verified schema validation, showing high downstream compliance.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-to-evolution-map successfully processed a massive context load of 52,855 tokens. This indicates a robust ability to map complex work items to evolution steps, providing a strong causal foundation for the downstream alignment and intent generation phases.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: In contrast to the baseline which saw a failure in the alignment-engine, this trace demonstrates a successful completion of the alignment phase. This step is critical for surfacing tensions and resolving trade-offs, and its successful schema validation indicates that tension analysis was performed and structured correctly.
